basics.name: Yuxin (Eric) Miao
basics.label: Machine Learning Engineer & Data Scientists
basics.summary: I am a machine learning engineer and data scientist, I want to devote myself to digital transformation and help companies to make better decisions with data.

work.name: Walmart
work.summary:
HelpDesk Chatbot Development:
- Devised a Large Language Model Chatbot, acted like ChatGPT and answered internal technical questions.
- Derived the method with limited GPU resources, fine-tuned a 1B parameter model locally, yielded an 80% accuracy.
- The Bot is now internally online to assist the daily operation inside the Walmart Sourcing department.

work.name: University of Zurich
work.summary: While at the University of Zurich, I wrote my first groundbreaking work referred to today as the Annus Mirabilis Papers.

work.name: Swiss Patent Office
work.summary: Responsible for evaluating the patent applications for electromagnetic devices.
highlights: Received promotion to Technical Expert, Second Class after 6 months of employment.

awards.title: Nobel Prize in Physics
awards.summary: The Nobel Prizes are five separate prizes that, according to Alfred Nobel's will of 1895, are awarded to 'those who, during the preceding year, have conferred the greatest benefit to humankind.'
